member.name: T:PharmacyService.API.Controllers.v1.InfoController
member.summary: Service metadata for the Pharmacy module.

member.name: M:PharmacyService.API.Controllers.v1.LmsInventoryIntegrationController.RecordReagentConsumption(PharmacyService.Application.Services.RecordLmsReagentConsumptionRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Webhook-style endpoint for LMS reagent consumption; logs with TenantId for audit.
